local_evidence.source: Small Claude projects weakest scan after command wrapper filtering
local_evidence.before: Weakest preview still included <local-command-stdout>Set model to ...</local-command-stdout>.
local_evidence.after: Post-fix scan with --source claude-code-projects --limit 80 --preview-limit 10 --weakest-first --include-prompts --no-export --json returned containsLocalCommand=false and containsCommandWrapper=false.

candidate.problem: Claude local-command stdout/stderr wrappers were shaped as user-role message content and survived prompt extraction.
candidate.risk: Command output events polluted weak-prompt previews and repair queues.
candidate.decision: Drop text that starts with <local-command- and has a local-command closing tag in strip_injected_context.

red.evidence: The new test failed with 2 records instead of the expected 1.

green.evidence: The focused test passed after local-command wrapper records were stripped to empty text.

full_verification.evidence: 10 UI helper tests passed, Vite build passed, 38 Rust library tests passed, 13 CLI tests passed, doc-tests passed, and strict clippy passed.

post_fix_smoke.evidence: containsLocalCommand=false and containsCommandWrapper=false; scan stopped at configured limit of 80 prompts as expected.
